mapper.select: SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_GROUP, MENU_TYPE, PAGE_ID, ICON_IMAGE, MENU_URL, SORT_ORDER, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM FROM NW_MENUS ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, MENU_ID ASC
SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_GROUP, MENU_TYPE, PAGE_ID, ICON_IMAGE, MENU_URL, SORT_ORDER, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM FROM NW_MENUS WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}

SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_GROUP, MENU_TYPE, PAGE_ID, ICON_IMAGE, MENU_URL, SORT_ORDER, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM FROM NW_MENUS WHERE MENU_GROUP = #{menuGroup} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, MENU_ID ASC

SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_GROUP, MENU_TYPE, PAGE_ID, ICON_IMAGE, MENU_URL, SORT_ORDER, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM FROM NW_MENUS WHERE MENU_NAME LIKE '%' + #{menuName} + '%' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, MENU_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NW_MENUS (MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_GROUP, MENU_TYPE, PAGE_ID, ICON_IMAGE, MENU_URL, SORT_ORDER, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{menuGroup}, #{menuType}, #{pageId}, #{iconImage}, #{menuUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{creatorId}, FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'))
mapper.update: UPDATE NW_MENUS SET MENU_NAME = #{menuName}, MENU_GROUP = #{menuGroup}, MENU_TYPE = #{menuType}, PAGE_ID = #{pageId}, ICON_IMAGE = #{iconImage}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId}, MODIFY_DTTM = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss') WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
